title: Zoetrope
description: The Victorian animation drum. A slotted cylinder spins, and through its slits a strip of still drawings springs to life — a bouncing ball, a running figure, a flapping bird or a blooming flower — one frame flicking to the next as each slot sweeps past. Spin it up until the slit strobe locks and the figure animates; slow it and the sequence smears. Subject, frame count, spin speed, slit width and palette are live and mappable.
